summary: Classified the five live inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical exists. No close, merge, fix, or low-signal action is safe or permitted from this job: instant close and low-signal closeout are disabled, merge/fix/raise_pr are blocked, and each open PR has maintainer/proof/technical-review gates that require human handling or continued author proof.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned broad documentation/runtime-contract PR needs maintainer review and proof judgment; no close or merge action is permitted.
Feature and compatibility/message-delivery risk require maintainer review; no autonomous close, merge, or fix path is allowed.
Focused message-delivery bug fix has active author follow-up and unresolved technical review judgment; keep open for maintainer/reviewer decision.
Proof waiver versus continued proof requirement is a maintainer/technical-correctness decision; no close action is safe.
Active author correction plus failed proof leaves a scope and technical-correctness decision for maintainers; no autonomous close, merge, or fix path is permitted.
